source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A solution of carbonic acid, H2CO3, is titrated with sodium hydroxide, NaOH. The following graph is produced. If the concentration of the sodium hydroxide is increased prior to repeating the titration, what effect, if any, would that have on the graph?
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: The equivalence points would be reached with less volume of NaOH added.

choice_map.A: The graph would not change at all.
choice_map.B: The pH values at the equivalence points would increase.
choice_map.C: The equivalence points would be reached with less volume of NaOH added.
choice_map.D: The slope of the equivalence points would decrease.

image field contains a PIL.Image placeholder string rather than a path or URL
